Introducing AutoMeet: Your Personal Meeting Assistant

Stay on top of your busy schedule and maximize productivity with AutoMeet, the ultimate Chrome extension designed to streamline your meeting experience. With AutoMeet, there's no need to constantly switch tabs or scramble to check when your next meeting is scheduled. Our powerful tool automatically alerts you about Zoom or Google Meetings on your calendar, ensuring you never miss an important session again.

Features:

Smart Meeting Alerts: AutoMeet intelligently scans your calendar for upcoming Zoom or Google Meetings and prompts a banner alert one minute before each session. Say goodbye to last-minute rushes and enjoy a stress-free meeting experience.

Meeting Summaries at a Glance: The banner alert not only notifies you about the upcoming meeting but also provides a concise summary of the event details. Get a quick overview of the meeting agenda, participants, and any additional notes right when you need it.

Convenient Meeting Access: With AutoMeet, joining your meetings is just a click away. Our extension conveniently includes a direct link to the meeting, allowing you to effortlessly connect without the hassle of searching for the meeting link in your calendar.

Current and Next Event List: Stay organized and informed with our intuitive popup window. AutoMeet displays a list of your current and upcoming events, providing you with a comprehensive overview of your schedule and helping you plan your day effectively.

Why Choose AutoMeet?

Boost Productivity: By eliminating the need to constantly switch tabs and search for meeting details, AutoMeet empowers you to stay focused on your work, ultimately enhancing your productivity.

Never Miss a Meeting: With AutoMeet's timely alerts and reminders, you can rest assured that you'll never miss an important meeting again. Be punctual, prepared, and make the most out of your valuable time.

Seamless Integration: AutoMeet seamlessly integrates with your existing calendar systems, supporting both Zoom and Google Meetings. It effortlessly syncs with your events, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free experience.

Easy to Use: Designed with simplicity in mind, AutoMeet is user-friendly and requires no complex setup. Install the extension, grant necessary permissions, and let AutoMeet take care of the rest.

Experience the future of meeting productivity with AutoMeet. Download now and let our personal meeting assistant revolutionize the way you manage your schedule. Say goodbye to unnecessary stress and hello to seamless, well-organized meetings.

Spendlo helps you spend less on online shopping by actually helping you stick to your budget. Unlike other tools that require you to actively check your budget, Spendlo shows you your budget right before you decide whether you want to make an online purchase. We believe that providing this information in-context can help people make better shopping decisions and keep more money in their pocket!

So how does it work?

Download the Spendlo extension and sign in using Facebook, Google, or Email

Check and edit your budget and recent transactions any time by clicking on the Spendlo chrome extension to access Budget View

To learn more about Spendlo, including why it was built, how to edit transactions, how data is stored, and more about our non-profit mission, visit www.getspendlo.com.

Universal Digital Assistant (Alpha) - Use the UDA as a general in-browser assistant to get your job done easier and faster. Just…

Universal Digital Assistant (Alpha) - Use the UDA as a general in-browser assistant to get your job done easier and faster. Just ask the assistant and let the assistant guide you through the activity.

Once it it is plugged in, you can view it on the right hand as UDAN. Click on the same, it will list out various options. First you notice a search text box. You can click on the 'mic' icon and just speak your query. If the tool has a solution, it will pop it up for you. All you have to do is click on 'play' and let he tool guide you through. 
Irrespective of which website you are on, the tool will try to guide you through. You can ask queries like "How do I change my password?" or "How do I list invoices?" or "How do I see this months report?"

Oh! The tool did not find a solution to your query? You can go ahead and create your own flows. 
Please go to "Advanced -> "record new sequence". Once the tool is in 'record' mode, you can go ahead and click in the target application as you normally would. Then give it a name and save. <Placeholder for 'record' video>. For example you are from the IT Admin department and would like to see the new requests for the hardware/software and any tickets that are in your priority list, You can create a sequence to record these steps. That's it  Once it is saved, you can use the search option and use the keywords or the name given to find the sequence created, and use the play icon to play the sequence. Cool! Isn't it?

More Cool stuff:
1. This is an open source (License AGPL) project with source code available here: https://github.com/Digital-Assistant
2. If you like it, you can deploy it in your organisation for free. (Please contact support@nistapp.com for paid support. )

Limitations: 
1. This is beta release and will work for most 'modern' websites using frameworks like React and Angular. 
2. This does not support sites built using iFrames - i.e. Microsoft Dynamics etc.

The Time Champ Chrome Extension is a browser tool that tracks user interactions by monitoring mouse clicks and the web pages visited. As a key component of the Time Champ system, it collects data for productivity analysis. The extension operates quietly in the background, capturing click events and recording the URLs of the websites users access. This data is then transmitted to the Time Champ server for real-time reporting and insights, enabling administrators to track web activity, ensure compliance, and optimize workflows.

Organize your online world with AI-powered pinning

Pinly: AI-Powered Content Pinning and Organization

Streamline Your Online Information Management with Intelligent Pinning

In today’s information-rich digital landscape, managing and organizing valuable content efficiently is more crucial than ever. Pinly.ai is a cutting-edge Chrome extension designed to revolutionize the way you capture, summarize, and organize online content. Leveraging the power of artificial intelligence, Pinly.ai transforms your browsing experience, enabling you to effortlessly pin content, generate concise summaries, and maintain structured records in Google Docs and Sheets. With additional features like automated weekly summary emails, Pinly.ai ensures that your important information is always at your fingertips, organized, and easily accessible.

🔍 What is Pinly.ai?

Pinly.ai is an AI-driven Chrome extension that empowers users to efficiently capture and manage online content. Whether you’re conducting research, tracking projects, or simply saving articles and ideas for future reference, Pinly.ai offers a seamless solution to keep your information organized and easily retrievable.

🚀 Key Features

	1.	AI-Powered Content Pinning

	•	Effortless Pinning: Right-click on any webpage and select “Pin with AI” to capture the essential content instantly.
	•	Intelligent Summarization: Pinly.ai utilizes advanced AI algorithms to generate concise summaries of the pinned content, saving you time and effort.

	2.	Seamless Integration with Google Docs and Sheets
	•	Organized Storage: Automatically stores your pinned summaries in Google Docs and Sheets, allowing for easy access, editing, and management.
	•	Structured Documentation: Maintains a centralized repository of all your pinned content, organized in a manner that facilitates efficient information retrieval.

	3.	Automated Weekly Summary Emails
	•	Comprehensive Overviews: Receives weekly emails compiling all your pinned content summaries, helping you stay informed and organized without manual effort.
	•	Timely Updates: Keeps you updated with a digest of your saved information, ensuring you never miss out on important insights.

	4.	User-Friendly Interface
	•	Intuitive Design: Easy-to-use interface that simplifies the pinning and organization process, making it accessible to users of all technical levels.
	•	Quick Access: Convenient toolbar and context menu options for fast and efficient interaction with the extension.

	5.	Privacy and Security
	•	Data Privacy: Committed to protecting your personal information. Pinly.ai only accesses data necessary for its functionalities and ensures secure data handling practices.
	•	Secure Integrations: Utilizes secure APIs for integrations with Google services and SendGrid, maintaining the integrity and confidentiality of your data.

	6.	Customization and Flexibility
	•	Personalized Settings: Customize how and where your content is stored, and configure email preferences to suit your workflow.
	•	Scalable Organization: Adaptable to various use cases, whether for personal knowledge management, professional research, or collaborative projects.

✨ Why Choose Pinly.ai?

	1.	Save Time and Boost Productivity
	•	Automated Summarization: Let AI handle the heavy lifting of summarizing lengthy articles and webpages, allowing you to focus on what truly matters.
	•	Efficient Organization: Automatically categorizes and stores your pinned content, eliminating the need for manual data entry and organization.

	2.	Enhance Information Management
	•	Centralized Repository: Keeps all your important information in one place, easily accessible through Google Docs and Sheets.
	•	Search and Retrieve Easily: Quickly find and reference your pinned content whenever you need it, enhancing your ability to utilize saved information effectively.

	3.	Stay Informed with Regular Updates
	•	Weekly Summaries: Receive regular overviews of your pinned content, ensuring you stay on top of your information without the hassle of sifting through multiple sources.
	•	Consistent Review: Facilitates regular engagement with your saved content, promoting better retention and utilization of information.

	4.	Seamless Workflow Integration
	•	Google Ecosystem Compatibility: Integrates smoothly with the Google ecosystem, leveraging familiar tools like Docs and Sheets for a cohesive user experience.
	•	Minimal Disruption: Designed to work alongside your existing workflows without causing interruptions, enhancing rather than hindering your productivity.

	5.	Robust Privacy and Security
	•	Data Protection: Implements stringent security measures to protect your data, ensuring that your information remains confidential and secure.
	•	Transparent Practices: Clear and transparent data handling policies, giving you confidence in how your information is managed.

	6.	Versatile Use Cases
	•	Research and Academia: Perfect for students, researchers, and academics who need to collect and organize vast amounts of information.
	•	Professional Projects: Ideal for professionals managing projects, tracking industry trends, or compiling resources for reports and presentations.
	•	Personal Knowledge Management: Great for individuals looking to organize personal interests, hobbies, or continuous learning materials.

🛠 How It Works

	1.	Install the Extension
	•	Visit the Chrome Web Store and install the Pinly.ai extension.

	2.	Pin Content with AI
	•	Navigate to any webpage containing valuable information.
	•	Right-click and select “Pin with AI” from the context menu.
	•	Pinly.ai captures the essential content and generates a concise summary using AI.

	3.	Organize in Google Docs and Sheets
	•	The summarized content is automatically saved to your designated Google Docs and Sheets.
	•	Access and manage your pinned content directly from these Google services, ensuring seamless organization and easy retrieval.

	4.	Receive Weekly Summary Emails
	•	Every week, Pinly.ai compiles all your pinned summaries and sends them to your email.
	•	Stay updated with a comprehensive overview of your saved content, aiding in efficient information review and management.

🔒 Privacy and Security

At Pinly.ai, your privacy and data security are paramount. We adhere to strict data protection standards to ensure that your information is handled responsibly and securely.

	•	Data Access: Pinly.ai requests only the necessary permissions required to provide its core functionalities, such as accessing Google Docs, Sheets, and your email address for sending summary emails.
	•	Data Storage: All your pinned content is stored within your own Google Docs and Sheets, giving you full control over your data.
	•	Secure Communications: Utilizes encrypted channels (HTTPS) for all data transmissions, safeguarding your information from unauthorized access.
	•	No Data Sharing: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to outside parties except for trusted third-party services that assist us in operating the extension (e.g., OpenAI for AI summarization, SendGrid for email services), and only under strict confidentiality agreements.

📈 Boost Your Productivity Today

Transform the way you manage online information with Pinly.ai. Experience the convenience of AI-powered content pinning, intelligent summarization, and seamless organization—all designed to enhance your productivity and streamline your information management processes.

Why wait?
Install Pinly.ai now and take the first step towards a more organized and efficient online experience.

🛠 Technical Details

	•	Compatibility: Chrome 80 and above
	•	Permissions Required:
	•	Google Sheets and Docs: To create, read, and update your pinned content.
	•	User Email: To send weekly summary emails.
	•	Active Tab and Storage: To manage and store your data locally.
	•	Technologies Used:
	•	AI Summarization: Powered by OpenAI’s advanced language models.
	•	Google APIs: For seamless integration with Google Docs and Sheets.
	•	Email Services: Utilizing SendGrid for reliable email delivery.

📚 Getting Started

	1.	Install the Extension:
	•	Go to the Chrome Web Store.
	•	Search for Pinly.ai and click “Add to Chrome”.

	2.	Set Up Your Account:
	•	Upon installation, sign in with your Google account to grant necessary permissions.
	•	Configure your Google Docs and Sheets preferences for storing pinned content.

	3.	Start Pinning:
	•	Browse the web as usual.
	•	When you find valuable content, right-click and select “Pin with AI” to capture and summarize it.

	4.	Review Your Pinned Content:
	•	Access your organized summaries in Google Docs and Sheets.
	•	Receive weekly emails with comprehensive overviews of your saved information.

🛡 Commitment to Excellence

Pinly.ai is dedicated to providing a reliable and secure tool that enhances your information management capabilities. Our team continuously works to improve the extension, incorporating user feedback and the latest advancements in AI and web technologies.

	•	Regular Updates: Ensuring compatibility with the latest browser versions and introducing new features based on user needs.
	•	Responsive Support: Offering prompt assistance to address any issues or queries you may have.
	•	Community Engagement: Actively seeking and valuing user feedback to shape the future development of Pinly.ai.

🌐 Stay Connected

	•	Website: www.pinly.ai
	•	Support: support@pinly.ai
	•	Follow Us: Stay updated with the latest features and updates on our social media channels.
	•	Twitter: @PinlyAI
	•	LinkedIn: Pinly.ai
	•	Facebook: Pinly.ai

📜 Terms of Service & Privacy Policy

	•	Terms of Service: Link to Terms
	•	Privacy Policy: Link to Privacy Policy

🛠 Troubleshooting and FAQs

Q1: Why isn’t my pinned content appearing in Google Docs/Sheets?
A1: Ensure that you’ve granted the necessary permissions during setup. You can reauthorize the extension in the Chrome settings if needed.

Q2: How can I customize where my pinned content is stored?
A2: Navigate to the Pinly.ai extension settings and adjust your Google Docs and Sheets preferences according to your organizational needs.

Q3: I’m not receiving weekly summary emails. What should I do?
A3: Check your email spam folder and ensure that the email address associated with your Google account is correct. You can also verify your email preferences in the extension settings.

Q4: How secure is my data with Pinly.ai?
A4: We prioritize your data security by implementing robust encryption and adhering to strict data handling policies. For more details, refer to our Privacy Policy.

Q5: Can I use Pinly.ai on multiple devices?
A5: Yes, as long as you’re signed in with the same Google account, your pinned content and settings are synchronized across devices.

🔗 Additional Resources

	•	User Guide: Detailed instructions on how to use all features of Pinly.ai.
	•	Video Tutorials: Step-by-step video guides to help you get the most out of the extension.
	•	Community Forum: Join our community to share tips, ask questions, and connect with other Pinly.ai users.

👋 Join the Pinly.ai Community Today!

Experience a smarter way to manage your online information. Pinly.ai combines the power of AI with seamless integrations to provide you with an unparalleled content management tool. Whether you’re a student, professional, researcher, or avid knowledge seeker, Pinly.ai is designed to enhance your productivity and keep your information organized effortlessly.

Install Pinly.ai Now and take control of your online information management!

Modern WhatsApp bulk messaging with CSV import, templates, scheduling, and automation tools

AutoMessage Pro for WhatsApp is a Chrome extension for WhatsApp Web that helps users send bulk messages, import contacts, create message templates, and manage campaigns from one workspace.

The extension is designed for businesses, sales teams, support teams, agencies, and entrepreneurs who use WhatsApp Web for customer communication. With AutoMessage Pro, users can import contacts from CSV files or Google Sheets, organize saved campaigns, prepare message templates, and send WhatsApp messages more efficiently.

Key features include:

• Bulk messaging for WhatsApp Web
• CSV import and Google Sheets import
• Message templates for repeated replies
• Saved campaigns and audience management
• Attachment support
• Delivery reports for sent campaigns

AutoMessage Pro helps simplify repetitive messaging tasks in WhatsApp Web by giving users a clearer workflow for preparing and managing campaigns. Instead of copying and pasting messages manually, users can organize contacts, format messages, save templates, and manage message sending from Chrome.

Premium features add more advanced tools for users who need additional automation and control, including:

• Campaign scheduling
• Time gaps and random delays
• Batching
• Multiple attachments and captions
• Quick replies
• Export tools for groups and contacts
• Advanced reporting

AutoMessage Pro is useful for WhatsApp bulk messaging, customer communication, follow-up campaigns, reminders, promotions, and organized message management inside WhatsApp Web. It is built to help users save time and manage messaging tasks more efficiently from Chrome.

Boost your productivity with our cutting-edge Chrome extension designed to seamlessly integrate with Google Sheets! This powerful…

Boost your productivity with our cutting-edge Chrome extension designed to seamlessly integrate with Google Sheets! This powerful tool eliminates the hassle of switching between browser tabs and spreadsheets—a common productivity killer. Instead, it creates a dynamic form directly from the headers in the first row of your Google Sheets, accessible right from the website you're working on.

With just a few clicks, you can select the specific spreadsheet and sheet you want to work with. The extension will automatically generate a form based on the headers in your chosen sheet, allowing you to enter data effortlessly. No more copying and pasting; simply start populating data, and it will be neatly organized in the correct columns and rows.

One of the standout features is the ability to right-click on any webpage data and send it directly to specific columns in your Google Sheets, making data entry faster and more intuitive than ever before. Plus, your data's security is our top priority. All operations happen within your Chrome browser and Google Drive—no data, spreadsheet names, or lists are sent to any server, ensuring that your information remains private and secure.

How to use:
================
Install the extension.
Navigate to your desired webpage.
Click on the extension to open it.
Log in with your Google account.
Select your spreadsheet and the specific sheet.
Ensure your sheet has headers in the first row.
The form will auto-create based on your headers.
Start populating data—it will be automatically organized in the right format.
Experience a seamless, secure, and efficient way to manage your Google Sheets data directly from any webpage. Try our Chrome extension today and see the difference in your workflow!

Capture regions, full screen, and seamless scrolling long screenshots.

# SnapLet - Element & Area Screenshot Tool

**Capture any web element or drag-to-select region in one click.**

SnapLet is a powerful Chrome extension that revolutionizes how you capture screenshots on the web. Whether you need to grab a specific element, select a custom area, or document web content for presentations, SnapLet makes it effortless and precise.

## 🚀 Why Choose SnapLet?

### **Precision at Your Fingertips**
- **Element-Perfect Capture**: Hover over any web element to highlight it, then right-click to capture exactly what you need
- **Custom Area Selection**: Drag to select any rectangular region on the page with pixel-perfect accuracy
- **No More Cropping**: Say goodbye to taking full-page screenshots and manually cropping them later

### **Streamlined Workflow**
- **One-Click Operation**: Enable the tool once, then capture multiple elements without reopening the extension
- **Instant Downloads**: Screenshots are automatically saved to your Downloads folder with timestamped filenames
- **Visual Feedback**: Real-time highlighting shows exactly what will be captured before you click

### **Professional Quality**
- **High-Resolution Output**: Captures elements at their native resolution for crisp, clear images
- **Clean Boundaries**: Automatically detects element boundaries for perfect framing
- **Consistent Results**: Every screenshot maintains the original quality and formatting

## 🎯 Perfect For

### **Web Developers & Designers**
- Document UI components and design elements
- Create visual bug reports with precise element captures
- Build design systems and component libraries
- Capture responsive design variations

### **Content Creators & Marketers**
- Create tutorials and how-to guides
- Document user interfaces for presentations
- Capture social media posts and web content
- Build visual documentation and reports

### **Researchers & Students**
- Document web-based research findings
- Capture data visualizations and charts
- Create visual citations and references
- Build comprehensive web content archives

### **Quality Assurance & Testing**
- Document software bugs with precise screenshots
- Create test case documentation
- Capture different states of web applications
- Build visual regression test suites

## ✨ Key Features

### **🎯 Element Screenshot Mode**
- **Smart Highlighting**: Hover over any element to see exactly what will be captured
- **Right-Click Capture**: Simple right-click context menu integration
- **Automatic Detection**: Intelligently identifies clickable elements, images, text blocks, and containers
- **Boundary Recognition**: Captures complete elements including padding and borders

### **📐 Area Screenshot Mode**
- **Drag-to-Select**: Click and drag to select any rectangular area
- **Visual Selection Box**: Real-time preview of the selected area
- **Flexible Sizing**: Select areas as small as a few pixels or as large as the entire viewport
- **Confirmation Controls**: Press Enter to confirm or ESC to cancel selection

### **🌍 Multi-Language Support**
- **4 Languages**: English, Chinese (Simplified), French, and Japanese
- **Localized Interface**: All tooltips and messages in your preferred language
- **Automatic Detection**: Uses your browser's language settings by default

### **⌨️ Intuitive Controls**
- **ESC to Exit**: Double-tap ESC key to quickly exit any mode
- **Visual Hints**: On-screen instructions guide you through each step
- **Keyboard Shortcuts**: Efficient workflow with minimal mouse clicks

### **🔧 Advanced Technology**
- **Chrome DevTools Integration**: Uses Chrome's native screenshot API for maximum quality
- **Memory Efficient**: Lightweight design that doesn't slow down your browsing
- **Cross-Site Compatible**: Works on any website, including complex web applications

## 🚀 Getting Started

### **Installation**
1. Install SnapLet from the Chrome Web Store
2. Click the SnapLet icon in your browser toolbar
3. Choose your preferred capture mode
4. Start capturing!

### **Element Screenshot**
1. Click "Element Screenshot" in the popup
2. Hover over any web element to highlight it
3. Right-click and select "📸 Capture This Element"
4. Your screenshot is automatically saved!

### **Area Screenshot**
1. Click "Area Screenshot" in the popup
2. Click and drag to select your desired area
3. Press Enter to confirm or ESC to cancel
4. Your custom area screenshot is saved!

## 💡 Pro Tips

### **Maximize Your Efficiency**
- **Batch Capturing**: Enable element mode once, then capture multiple elements without reopening
- **Precise Selection**: Use area mode for capturing specific portions of complex layouts
- **Quick Exit**: Double-tap ESC to quickly exit any mode and return to normal browsing

### **Best Practices**
- **Wait for Load**: Ensure pages are fully loaded before capturing for best results
- **Check Highlights**: Verify the highlight covers your intended element before right-clicking
- **Use Area Mode**: For elements that don't highlight properly, use area selection instead

## 🔒 Privacy & Security

- **No Data Collection**: SnapLet doesn't collect, store, or transmit any personal data
- **Local Processing**: All screenshot processing happens locally in your browser
- **Minimal Permissions**: Only requests necessary permissions for screenshot functionality
- **Open Source Ready**: Clean, auditable codebase for transparency

## 🆚 Why SnapLet vs. Other Tools?

### **Compared to Built-in Browser Tools**
- ✅ **Element-specific capture** vs. ❌ Full page screenshots only
- ✅ **One-click operation** vs. ❌ Multiple steps required
- ✅ **Visual highlighting** vs. ❌ Guesswork selection

### **Compared to Other Extensions**
- ✅ **Dual capture modes** vs. ❌ Single functionality
- ✅ **Native quality** vs. ❌ Compressed outputs
- ✅ **Multi-language support** vs. ❌ English only
- ✅ **Lightweight design** vs. ❌ Resource-heavy alternatives

### **Compared to External Tools**
- ✅ **Browser integration** vs. ❌ Separate applications
- ✅ **Instant capture** vs. ❌ Import/export workflows
- ✅ **Free to use** vs. ❌ Subscription costs

Shows a persistent, styled browser profile badge in the page corner.

Profile Badge by technohues helps you instantly identify which browser profile you’re working in by showing a customizable badge directly on web pages.

If you use multiple Chrome or Edge profiles for work, personal browsing, testing, clients, or different accounts, it is easy to lose track of which profile you are currently using. Profile Badge keeps that context visible with a clean on-page label that you can position and style your way.

With Profile Badge, you can:

- Show or hide the badge on web pages
- Set a custom badge name manually
- Choose badge position: top left, top centre, top right, bottom left, bottom centre, or bottom right
- Fine-tune vertical and horizontal offsets
- Customize font, size, color, bold, italic, underline, background, border, radius, opacity, and shadow
- Use a live sticky preview while editing
- Choose whether the badge appears in fullscreen mode
- Switch the popup between light mode, dark mode, or system appearance

Profile Badge is especially useful for people who manage multiple accounts, developers testing across profiles, support teams, consultants, and anyone who wants a clear visual reminder of their current browsing context.

Install Profile Badge to reduce profile mix-ups and keep your browser workspace easier to recognize at a glance.

• 🛡️ Sécurité Cloud Extrême : Nouveau chronomètre intelligent avec auto-sauvegarde toutes les 50 minutes pour empêcher toute perte de données lors de l'expiration des sessions Firebase.

Si vous utilisez l'Intelligence Artificielle au quotidien, vous connaissez le problème : l'historique de vos conversations devient vite un chaos ingérable. Retrouver un chat précis d'il y a trois semaines est presque impossible, les barres latérales sont saturées, et passer d'une IA à l'autre vous fait perdre le fil de vos idées.

AI Organizer OS est la solution ultime. Nous avons transformé votre navigateur en un système d'exploitation flottant et intégré (façon smartphone) qui se superpose élégamment à vos IA préférées. Ce n'est pas un simple gestionnaire de favoris ; c'est un espace de travail complet, sécurisé et intelligent.

🤖 COMPATIBILITÉ NATIVE UNIVERSELLE
S'intègre de manière fluide sans ralentir votre navigateur, directement en surimpression sur :
• ChatGPT (OpenAI)
• Gemini (Google)
• Copilot (Microsoft)
• Grok (xAI)

🌟 FONCTIONNALITÉS ESSENTIELLES (VERSION GRATUITE)
La version gratuite d'AI Organizer OS vous donne une base solide pour reprendre le contrôle de vos connaissances, avec un stockage 100% local sur votre machine.

📁 Dossiers Thématiques : Créez jusqu'à 5 dossiers et sauvegardez jusqu'à 20 conversations par dossier pour organiser vos chats par projets, clients ou sujets. Ajoutez des emojis pour une identification visuelle instantanée (ex: 💻 Code, 🍳 Recettes, 📈 Marketing).
🖱️ Organisation Drag & Drop : Déplacez vos conversations d'un dossier à l'autre par un simple glisser-déposer, comme sur le bureau de votre ordinateur.
📌 Système d'Épingles (Favoris) : Gardez vos chats les plus importants ou vos "Master Prompts" épinglés en haut de votre liste pour un accès en un clic.
🛡️ Anti-doublon Intelligent : Impossible de sauvegarder deux fois la même conversation par erreur.
🗑️ Corbeille de Sécurité : Une erreur ? Pas de panique. Tous les dossiers et liens supprimés vont dans une corbeille d'où vous pouvez facilement les restaurer.

👑 DÉBLOQUEZ LA PUISSANCE TOTALE (VERSION PREMIUM - PRO)
Passez au niveau supérieur avec une licence Premium et transformez AI Organizer en un coffre-fort Cloud polyvalent.

♾️ Dossiers & Liens Illimités : Faites sauter les limites de la version gratuite. Organisez des centaines de projets complexes et sauvegardez vos conversations à l'infini.
☁️ Synchronisation Cloud en Temps Réel : Vos dossiers, liens et notes sont instantanément sauvegardés dans le Cloud. Commencez vos recherches au bureau, et retrouvez vos dossiers triés sur votre PC portable à la maison.
🔐 Coffre-fort Sécurisé (Code PIN) : Verrouillez l'accès à vos dossiers IA avec un code PIN à 4 chiffres. Le système inclut une protection anti-intrusion.
📝 Bloc-notes Global (Cross-Platform) : Un éditeur de texte intégré directement dans l'extension. Prenez des notes sur une réponse Gemini, sauvegardez votre texte, ouvrez ChatGPT et collez-le !

🔒 SÉCURITÉ ET CONFIDENTIALITÉ (NOTRE PROMESSE)
• Zéro lecture de contenu : L'extension ne "lit" JAMAIS vos conversations. Nous ne stockons QUE les hyperliens (URL) et les titres.
• Hébergement Européen : Nos serveurs Cloud (Firebase) sont situés en Europe (RGPD).
• Zéro Tracker : Nous ne vendons pas vos données et n'injectons aucune publicité.
